description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in ol'bookmarks 0.7.4 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the root parameter to (1) test1.php, (2) blackorange.php, (3) default.php, (4) frames1.php, (5) frames1_top.php, (7) test2.php, (8) test3.php, (9) test4.php, (10) test5.php, (11) test6.php, (12) frames1_left.php, and (13) frames1_center.php in themes/.
